Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ConnectedAppSamlConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ConnectedAppSamlConfig
public class ConnectedAppSamlConfig extends Object

Java class for ConnectedAppSamlConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ConnectedAppSamlConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="acsUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="certificate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="encryptionCertificate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="encryptionType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SamlEncryptionType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="entityUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="issuer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="samlIdpSLOBindingEnum" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SamlIdpSLOBinding" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="samlNameIdFormat" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SamlNameIdFormatType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="samlSigningAlgoType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SamlSigningAlgoType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="samlSloUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="samlSubjectCustomAttr" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="samlSubjectType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}SamlSubjectType"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
